data_sources.state_gdp_per_capita: MoSPI State GDP estimates 2022-23, current prices; Karnataka ranked 4th in per-capita GSDP
data_sources.state_informal_economy_share: NSSO PLFS 2022-23, estimated; Karnataka's IT sector raises formal share but rural economy remains largely informal
data_sources.ruling_party_trust_index: Estimated from Lokniti-CSDS post-2023 Karnataka election survey; Congress government satisfaction index
data_sources.political_contestation_index: ECI 2023 Karnataka Assembly election data; strong two-party (BJP vs Congress) contest, JDS as swing factor
data_sources.language_network_multiplier: Census 2011; 0.85 reflects multilingual tech corridor where English, Hindi, Telugu, Tamil coexist, dampening Kannada-only information diffusion speed
data_sources.media_penetration: BARC India 2023 (tv), IRS 2022 (print), IAMAI-Kantar 2023 (digital), RAM Ratings 2022 (radio)
data_sources.union_legal_framework: Karnataka Industrial Disputes Act framework assessed as moderate
data_sources.examination_board: Both Karnataka State Board (KSEEB/PUE) and CBSE operate; CBSE particularly popular in Bengaluru urban
